expectations.evidence: No overview table. Has a text-based 'Dependency Map' at the end but not a structured summary table
Tasks have 'What', 'Where', 'Details' but no 'Context' section. Implementation details are present but background/motivation is not explained per task
No acceptance criteria sections. Tasks end with 'Details' — no verifiable done-state defined
No per-task dependency sections. Dependencies only appear in the dependency map at the end
No spec exists for this eval. No external references to punt context to
Covers API (Phases 1-2), frontend (Phase 3), mobile (Phase 4), backward compatibility (Phase 2+5), cleanup (Phase 6)
Uses Phase/Task numbering (1.1, 2.1), What/Where/Details format, no overview table, no Goal line
